goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 17:15'.
The train should depart from 'norwich' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'departure time', and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 17:15
The train should depart from norwich and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get train ID, departure time, and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee
